name: genpark-customer-winback-skill
description: GenPark AI Agent Skill - Identify lapsed customers, score their win-back potential, generate personalized re-engagement offers, and build win-back email sequences.
author: genpark

customers.description: Lapsed customer records: [{id, days_since_purchase, total_orders, total_spend, avg_order_value, preferred_category}].

max_discount_pct.description: Maximum discount to offer high-value customers.

prioritized_customers.description: Customers ranked by win-back potential with offers and email sequence.
